headline: Parker-Hannifin (PH) Valuation Check After Strong Momentum And Premium P/E Multiple
summary: What Parker-Hannifin’s recent performance means for investors Parker-Hannifin (PH) has drawn fresh attention after a strong run in the stock, with the share price up around 11% over the past month and about 5% in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Parker-Hannifin. The recent move adds to a wider upswing, with a 30 day share price return of 11.2% and a year to date share price return of 10.7%, alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 75.3%.
